body_transformation: Electabuzz's rounded head now bears delicate petal-like ear flaps with subtle shimmer, its compact muscular body covered in soft ivory white fur with faint lavender streaks. The yellow and blue striped pattern transforms into glowing starlight silver markings that trace the contours of its limbs and chest. Its curled spiral tail tip is now encased in translucent crystalline scales that refract light like dewdrops, while the dark blue chest lightning bolt becomes a soft glowing orb of petal gold. The electric shock waves around its body dissipate into gentle, shimmering starlight dust that clings to its fur.
signature_feature: Chest orb: petal gold crystalline sphere with starlight silver radiating veins.
